a.footnote-backref.footnote-link.--icon-content-font: '??', '??', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Consolas", "Source Code Pro", monospace

blockquote.background: oklch(0.8 0.0756825 293.56 / 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--accent-1: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(calc(258 - 1), calc(88% * 1.01), calc(66% * 1.075)) l c h) l c calc(h + 30))
body.--accent-2: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(calc(258 - 1), calc(88% * 1.01), calc(66% * 1.075)) l c h) l c calc(h + 330))
body.--blockquote-border-color: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(257, 88.88%, 70.95%) l c h) 50% c h / 75%)
body.--bold-color:
oklch(
    from oklch(from hsl(calc(258 - 1), calc(88% * 1.01), calc(66% * 1.075)) l c h) calc(50% - 15%) 30%
      calc(h + 100)
  )
body.--interactive-active: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(257, 88.88%, 70.95%) l c h) 50% c h / 50%)
body.--italic-color:
oklch(
    from oklch(from hsl(calc(258 - 1), calc(88% * 1.01), calc(66% * 1.075)) l c h) calc(50% - 15%) 30%
      calc(h + 200)
  )
body.--nav-item-background-selected: oklch(from oklch(from oklch(from hsl(calc(258 - 1), calc(88% * 1.01), calc(66% * 1.075)) l c h) l c calc(h + 330)) 80% 30% h / 75%)
body.--outline-color: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(257, 88.88%, 70.95%) l c h) 25% c h)
body.--retroma-folder-border:
1px solid
    oklch(from oklch(from oklch(from hsl(calc(258 - 1), calc(88% * 1.01), calc(66% * 1.075)) l c h) l c calc(h + 330)) 55% 30% h / 50%)
body.--slider-track-background: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(257, 88.88%, 70.95%) l c h) 50% c h / 50%)
body.--strong-emphasis:
oklch(
    from oklch(from hsl(calc(258 - 1), calc(88% * 1.01), calc(66% * 1.075)) l c h) calc(50% - 15%) 30%
      calc(h + 200)
  )
body.--table-data-background: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(257, 88.88%, 70.95%) l c h) l c h / 7%)
body.--table-header-background: oklch(from oklch(from oklch(from hsl(calc(258 - 1), calc(88% * 1.01), calc(66% * 1.075)) l c h) l c calc(h + 30)) 50% c h / 30%)
body.--tag-color: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(257, 88.88%, 70.95%) l c h) 40% c h / 75%)
body.--text-highlight-bg: oklch(from oklch(from oklch(from hsl(calc(258 - 1), calc(88% * 1.01), calc(66% * 1.075)) l c h) l c calc(h + 30)) 80% 30% h / 75%)
body.--text-selection: oklch(from oklch(from oklch(from hsl(calc(258 - 1), calc(88% * 1.01), calc(66% * 1.075)) l c h) l c calc(h + 330)) 80% 30% h / 75%)
body.background: oklch(0.93 0.0756825 263.56) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: oklch(0.93 0.0756825 263.56) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: oklch(0.8 0.0756825 293.56) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: oklch(0.8 0.0756825 293.56) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
